title: Add an inactivity boundary to ResearchOps Flux sessions.

run.taskSummary: Fix ResearchOps visits more than seven hours apart being stored as one Flux session.

validations: production D1 showed 09:41-09:42 UTC events on the 02:28 UTC session
collector preflight returned HTTP 204 with no-store
session lifecycle tests failed before and passed after implementation
focused lifecycle and route-state tests: 3 passed
code-confidence grader: 0.65 fail due unmapped documentation and structured-evidence criteria
issues: The tracker equated sessionStorage lifetime with behavioural-session lifetime.
warnings: Historical event keys cannot be enriched retroactively.
Production rollover requires post-deployment D1 verification.
The generic confidence grader cannot map its documentation or structured-evidence criteria to available evidence fields.
